active_checklist: Guard roadmap implementation with tests, docs/TODO/changelog, and authority boundaries.

child_heartbeat.current_step: final governance closeout complete; focused tests passed and residuals recorded

lane_claim: Manager: enforce docs/TODO/changelog/test governance, authority boundaries, and promotion gates for the Kanboard roadmap; may spawn up to six leaf workers.
last_deescalation_rule: De-escalate once ambiguity collapses and the work reduces to a narrow bounded edit set.
last_escalation_rule: Escalate one tier if constraints are missed twice, ambiguity grows, or the task proves more coupled than the current frame indicates.

model_allocation.deescalation_rule: De-escalate once ambiguity collapses and the work reduces to a narrow bounded edit set.
model_allocation.escalation_rule: Escalate one tier if constraints are missed twice, ambiguity grows, or the task proves more coupled than the current frame indicates.
model_allocation.reason: Coding task is coupled or has already shown lower-tier trouble, so deep coding reasoning is warranted.

model_allocation.escalation_rule: Escalate one tier if constraints are missed twice, ambiguity grows, or the task proves more coupled than the current frame indicates.

notes: Lane ownership: verification plan, docs/TODO/changelog alignment, and final gate reporting. Avoid editing implementation files owned by other managers unless fixing a test-only integration issue after they report. Validate that local JSON remains canonical, external Kanboard mutation is opt-in, secrets are not logged, and no two-way sync exists without conflict policy. Preferred model: gpt-5.1-codex-mini for docs/test triage; escalate to gpt-5.1-codex-max only for coupled integration failures.

items.title: Record baseline focused tests and known dirty-worktree constraints
Check authority, metadata, one-way sync, and secret-handling boundaries
Align StatiBaker docs/TODO/changelog after implementation lanes report
Run focused test suite and summarize residual risk
Return promotion recommendation with ZKP summary
